intent: GDPR consent schema foundation: user_consents migration, consentService gatekeeper, consent-inventory.md, Dexie v58, parity+LWW tests

findings.title: Missing moddatetime trigger on user_consents.updated_at
findings.suggested_fix: Add DROP/CREATE TRIGGER set_updated_at using extensions.moddatetime('updated_at') on user_consents, matching pattern from P1 migration

findings.title: consentService has no unit tests for fail-closed gatekeeper
findings.suggested_fix: Create src/lib/compliance/__tests__/consentService.test.ts with mocked db testing isGranted (granted, withdrawn, unknown purpose, DB error), listForUser, isGrantedForProvider

findings.title: IConsentService interface missing isGrantedForProvider
findings.suggested_fix: Add isGrantedForProvider(userId: string, purpose: string, providerId: string): Promise<boolean> to IConsentService interface

findings.title: Invalid migration filename date: April 31 does not exist
findings.suggested_fix: Rename to 20260423000002_user_consents.sql (April 23 is the actual commit date; sequence after 20260423000001)

findings.title: Migration comment: withdrawn_at NULL != currently granted for never-granted rows
findings.suggested_fix: Change comment to: withdrawn_at NULL + granted_at NOT NULL → consent currently granted; both NULL → never granted

findings.title: tableRegistry JSDoc says 38 tables, should be 39
findings.suggested_fix: Change 'Array of all 38 syncable tables' to 'Array of all 39 syncable tables'

findings.title: checkpoint.ts docblock references stale version 52
findings.suggested_fix: Update 'frozen snapshot of the complete IndexedDB schema at version 52' to 'at version 58' and 'result of applying all migrations v1-v52' to 'v1-v58'

findings.title: isGrantedForProvider duplicates granted-check from isGranted
findings.suggested_fix: Refactor: call isGranted(userId, purpose) first; return false if not granted; then check evidence.provider_id for the provider match

residual_risks: userConsents rows that exist in Supabase before the moddatetime trigger is installed will have stale updated_at values — this affects sync ordering but not data correctness
consentService reads from Dexie (local-only); if sync hasn't run yet after browser fresh start, AI features could be incorrectly blocked or opened depending on timing
testing_gaps: No unit test for consentService.isGranted() with mocked Dexie
No unit test for isGrantedForProvider() covering provider mismatch case
No test for isGranted() with DB throwing an error (fail-closed verification)
